meaning: n.丑角,滑稽动作adj.奇特的,滑稽可笑的
examples: There be Punch-and-Judy shows, and monkeys—oh such antic creatures!
Dido: a mischievous prank or antic; a caper.
Antic and colleagues probed the activity of neurons in lab dishes one at a time.
Antic also hinted that Torres' qualities could be a sign of Benitez changing Liverpool's style.
As Johnson cycles through this trio of narrations, the plot takes on an antic cast.
